description: <b>Style Note</b>All those kids who can't live without their fix of Cartoon Network will love this shirt! It's brought to you by BeBorn, a sub-brand of doodle, so you can rest easy knowing the quality will be up to standard. <b>Product Details</b>White round neck T-shirt with a graphic print and text on the chest <b>Material and Care</b>100% cottonWash separately Dry in shadeDo not iron on printDo not rub or twist the garments<b>Style Note</b>All those kids who can't live without their fix of Cartoon Network will love this shirt!
